name: BACARDÍ & Cola
title: BACARDÍ Rum & Cola Cocktail Recipe | How to make a BACARDÍ Rum & Cola | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A classic Bacardi rum and cola made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca and chilled cola over ice.
marketing_description: Like many of the world's greatest pairings, a rum and cola is best if made with 'the original' BACARDÍ. BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum was designed to be the ultimate mixing spirit.

steps: Fill a highball glass with ice.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Blanca white rum, followed by chilled cola, and give it all a gentle stir.
Give it all a gentle stir.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a BACARDÍ & Cola 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum 100 ml cola ... Fill a highball glass with ice. Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Blanca white rum, followed by chilled cola, and give it all a gentle stir. Add the chilled cola. Stir Give it all a gentle stir. No garnish.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make a classic BACARDÍ Rum & Cola Cocktail. Mix this classic cocktail using fresh mint, white rum, sugar, zesty lime and cooling soda water.

extraction_warnings: Recipe steps on the page appear duplicated/redundant; preserved as written and condensed into ordered steps.
Main rum is explicit as BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, also referenced as BACARDÍ Superior in FAQ; used page's primary rum naming.
